remarks: Tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac in the heart of Rowayton, 8 Meeker Court presents a rare opportunity to create your own custom home in one of Fairfield County's most sought-after coastal communities. Set on .36 acres, this level parcel offers a peaceful setting while remaining just moments from everything that makes Rowayton so special.  Enjoy a truly convenient lifestyle with easy access to the Rowayton train station, village shops, restaurants, and waterfront amenities. Located within the highly regarded Rowayton school district, this property combines location, lifestyle, and long-term value.  Interested parties to perform land diligence. A unique chance to bring your vision to life in an established neighborhood with strong demand and limited land availability.
